nasb.text: “This shall be the law of the leper in the day of his cleansing. Now he shall be brought to the priest,

esv.text: “This shall be the law of the leprous person for the day of his cleansing. He shall be brought to the priest,

cnv.text: “患痲風病的人得潔淨的日子，應守的律例如下：人要帶他去見祭司。

ccb.text: “以下是有关麻风病患者的洁净条例。 “麻风病患者痊愈后，要通知祭司。
